input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.4.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.4.4
            TITLE: if an implausibility occurs between the values of the two tpss and persists for more than 100

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.4.4: If an Implausibility occurs between the values of the two TPSs and persists for more than 100
IC.4.4.4 If an Implausibility occurs between the values of the two TPSs and persists for more than 100 
msec, the power to the electronic throttle must be immediately shut down.

final_answer: Rule IC.4.4.4: If an Implausibility occurs between the values of the two TPSs and persists for more than 100 msec, the power to the electronic throttle must be immediately shut down.
